subcodes.first_line: Convey greetings unto all the friends, and forbid them from idle pastimes and diversions - the wine of love for the Incomparable Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع احباء را تکبیر برسانید و از لهو و لعب منع فرمائید خمر محبت حضرت بیمثال
subcodes.subjects: @begging; mendicancy; idleness and sloth, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God
